title: cyclosorus usitatus
intro: Cyclosorus usitatus, also known as the Japanese fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of Cyclosorus usitatus include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Cyclosorus usitatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices.
